title: MyGift Vintage Design Embossed Fleur De Lis Clear Glass Bottles with Cork Lid, Apothecary Flower Bud Vases, Set of 6
description:
About this item
Set of 6 vintage embossed clear glass bottles with removable cork lids
Perfect for displaying cut flowers and plants for tabletop wedding centerpieces and for everyday use around your home; Removable corked lids help to keep the contents of the bottles fresh
Can be used to store spices, oils, soaps, and aromatherapy sticks
Embossed fleur de lis design and clear glass design adds a touch of vintage decorative accent to a wide range of decors
Approximate Dimensions: Overall - 5.25 H x 2.75 Diameter, Opening - 1.0 Diameter; Removable Cork - 0.75 H x 1.0 Diameter (in inches)
reviews_5s: Well made, heavy duty glass. Made a beautiful giftThese are great, but they did not show the ounces available. But I do love them really cute great design.I made my own bubble bath concoctions for gifts and these jars were perfect. They are well made, arrived without issue, and the corks are snug in just the right way so you don't have to worry too much about spills. I love that the gift receivers can reuse these when they are empty and get some extended joy out of displaying them. I saved one for myself.Used them for gift cocktail ingredients—they were a big hit!Stylish design. We use them primarily for bud vases. They look good on their own too. Great option.I didn't read the dimension (doh!) in the description, but just looked at the picture and thought these were a variety of sizes. They're actually all the same size and fairly small, BUT they are stunning. So while I'm not using them for what I expected to, I am definitely keeping them. Note to self though, already read the description.I bought these to fill with fairy lights and hang from a piece of driftwood I found on the beach. They are perfect for my craft project!!! They arrived in a thick box with plenty of protective padding.When I first got these I thought the bottle were going to have a hazy clear color but once I washed them they were absolutely stunning. The quality is very nice. We used them Austin roses as side bouquet on the tables at our daughters wedding. Couldn’t be more pleased. Highly recommend.Beautiful and elegantly. You will not be disappointed beautiful.These gave some subtle and functional styles to my kitchen. I don’t like having jugs of dish washing liquids or bleach around my sink and this was a cute way to be practical. They came quickly and were packaged very nicely.
reviews_1s: Didn't not recieve my product with no support from the company itself.
